Connections Made

The Experience

Three Pillars of the
Inaugural Retreat

⚓

Community

Black MBA Sail brings together the brightest Black business minds from programs across the country — a curated space at sea to forge bonds, find collaborators, and build your inner circle for life.

◈

Professional Power

Executive panels, investment workshops, mentorship roundtables, and career conversations — programming designed to sharpen your edge and expand your network at the highest level.

✦

Celebration

Themed nights, island excursions, a formal gala, sunrise wellness on deck, and vibrant social events — because being in the room is not enough. We own it.

Our Story

Rooted in Greatness.
Making History.

Black MBA Sail is the inaugural chapter of a new tradition — building on the legacy of historic Black MBA gatherings like Black Ski Weekend, MLT, and Consortium. We take that spirit onto the open Caribbean sea. First time ever.

Our Story Join the Waitlist

Community Voices

Why We Gather

"

Black Ski Weekend changed the trajectory of my career. The connections made on that mountain are now some of my closest advisors and friends.

Harvard Business School, '23

"

When we gather unapologetically as Black business leaders, something powerful happens. You leave more grounded, more connected, and ready to take on everything.

Tuck School of Business, '22

"

The people I met at Consortium are now my co-founders and mentors. A retreat like this is not a trip — it is an investment in your entire career trajectory.

Wharton School, '24

Be Part of Year One

The Inaugural Black MBA Sail.

About Black MBA Sail

More Than a Trip.
A Movement.

Our Mission

We Gather to Rise

Black MBA Sail exists to create the premier Black MBA gathering at sea — a space of joy, serious networking, professional development, and collective celebration. We believe when we pour into each other, we pour into the future of Black business leadership.

"The most powerful thing we can do is show up for each other — loudly, joyfully, and at the highest levels of excellence."

Black MBA Sail Organizing Committee

Our Roots

Carrying a Proud Legacy

For decades, Black MBA students have gathered at ski weekends, symposia, and retreats — from the legendary MLK Ski Weekend to Tuck Black Ski, from MLT to Consortium. These events became community infrastructure that shaped careers and built lifelong bonds.

Black MBA Sail carries that torch onto the water. Same energy. Same excellence. An entirely new horizon.

Who Attends

Built for Black Business Leaders

🎓

Current MBA Students

Full-time and part-time MBA students from accredited programs. You are the heart of Black MBA Sail.

◈

Recent Alumni

MBA alumni within 5 years of graduation. Your experience and networks make the retreat richer for everyone.

✦

Young Professionals

Other business-minded young professionals eager to connect with the Black MBA ecosystem may also apply to attend.

Our Values

What We Stand For

Unapologetic Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standard — in business, in community, and in how we show up for each other.

Belonging

Every attendee deserves to feel fully at home. No code-switching. No shrinking. Come exactly as you are.

Collective Advancement

The connections made on this retreat are designed to translate into mentorships, referrals, co-ventures, and lifelong support.

Joy as Strategy

Rest and celebration are not frivolous — they are essential. We invest in joy as deliberately as professional development.

Be Part of Year One

Join the waitlist and be among the first to make history.

The Experience

Luxury From
Bow to Stern

What's Included

Everything You Need.
Nothing Left to Chance.

🛏

Stateroom Accommodations

5 nights in your selected cabin category with daily housekeeping and turndown service throughout the voyage.

🍽

All Meals Onboard

From world-class main dining to 20+ unique eateries — all meals are included with access to dining venues curated especially for our guests.

🎤

Full Programming Access

All panels, workshops, roundtables, themed social events, and the formal gala dinner are included.

🏊

Ship Amenities

Pools, fitness center, deck lounges, entertainment venues, and onboard activities throughout the voyage.

✨

Prepaid Gratuities

All gratuities are prepaid and included — no surprise charges at checkout. Every crew member is taken care of so you can focus entirely on the voyage.

🌴

Welcome & Farewell Events

Curated Black MBA Sail events woven throughout the voyage — welcome reception, rooftop mixers, networking dinners, and a farewell brunch to close out the experience.

📋

Concierge Support

Dedicated team available throughout the retreat for assistance, coordination, and any needs that arise.

Not included: Airfare and ground transportation to/from Port of Miami; travel insurance (strongly recommended); select onboard purchases; spa services; and personal expenses. A finalized itinerary with our curated activity guide will be shared with all confirmed guests ahead of departure.

5 Nights · 2 Ports · 1 Historic Voyage

The Inaugural
Itinerary

Navigate the Voyage

1Miami — Embarkation
2Day at Sea
3Puerto Plata, DR
4Day at Sea
5Bimini, Bahamas
6Miami — Return
1

Day One

Miami, Florida, USA

Departure — embarkation from the Port of Miami.

2

Day Two

Sailing — Day at Sea

A full day on the open water.

~ Cruising the Atlantic ~

3

Day Three

Puerto Plata, Dominican Republic

Mountains, beaches, and Afro-Caribbean culture.

Puerto Plata, Dominican Republic

A vibrant city where the Atlantic meets the mountains. Known for its amber beaches, the iconic cable car to Mount Isabel de Torres, and warm Afro-Caribbean culture.

4

Day Four

Sailing — Day at Sea

A day to connect, reflect, and recharge.

~ Cruising the Caribbean ~

5

Day Five

The Beach Club at Bimini, Bahamas

Pure paradise — the Caribbean's best kept secret.

The Beach Club at Bimini, Bahamas

A private beach club experience on one of the Bahamas' most beautiful islands — crystal-clear turquoise water, white sand, and a pristine resort atmosphere.

6

Day Six

Miami, Florida, USA

Return to Miami — Arrival.
